name: @bigcapital/sdk-ts
description: TypeScript types generated from the Bigcapital API OpenAPI/Swagger spec

scripts.generate: node -e "if(!require('fs').existsSync('./openapi.json')){console.error('\n  openapi.json not found. Run from repo root: pnpm run generate:sdk-types\n'); process.exit(1)}" && npx openapi-typescript ./openapi.json -o ./src/schema.ts
scripts.build: npm run build:cjs && npm run build:esm
